justification: All 7 ACs implemented and tested. Collect-all-errors pattern confirmed with AC7 tests verifying exact error counts (2 and 3 simultaneous errors). AC5 and AC6 are distinct and correctly conditional on shipment_type. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs. No external libraries. 15 tests pass covering boundary values and edge cases.

observations.text: AC5/AC6 correctly distinguish presence vs value semantics for saturday_delivery — false counts as provided
AC7 tested with both 2-error and 3-error cases, confirming no fail-fast
Both express and standard happy paths tested in AC1
